sprite::NodePtr Struct Reference

#include <pointer.hpp>

 Call a member through the pointer, after skipping any FWD nodes.

Detailed Description

A reference-counting pointer for Node objects.

This is based on boost::intrusive_ptr, so the reference count is stored within the Node object itself (to maximize performance). All dereferencing operations skip over FWD nodes, which are nodes that simply forward their reference to a new target. Those may occur when a node with multiple external references is rewritten.
